human_verification.notes: Reviewed manifest, authority sources, research summary, functionality map, evaluation scenarios, results, deployment notes, marketing notes, and release readiness for issue #1617.

trusted_build_claim.reason: Issue #1617 requires specification-based posture unless a separate frequent-use promotion is documented; no such evidence exists in this package.

notes: Spec pack is the canonical source of truth for future materialization.
Functionality coverage is complete for shared abilities, review-assessment-and-inspection abilities, and professional-and-information-services abilities.

Evaluation scenarios cover API surface design, OpenAPI-first recommendations, contract review, guardrails, edge cases, security, remediation, evidence gaps, confidentiality, signoff refusal, adjacent routing, low confidence, conflicting policy, tenant adaptation, and no unreviewed regressions.
Structured readiness evidence supports a validated claim without asserting a retained implementation.
